CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Continued To Nov-01-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-20-2005 Vacated

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise (two minors on one Petition) hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Donald S. Friedman, Esq. for Petitioner: Ella Hendricks, present as Guardian at litem for: Robert S. Hunt and Qyhnysha Higginbotham, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Total Attorney's Fees $3,860.60
Total Costs $2,974.23
A net balance of $1,361.35 for Minor: Qyhnysha Higginbotham and net balance of $8,803.82 for Minor: Robert S. Hunt, to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 1266 Market St., San Francisco, CA. 94103, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claims and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account for each minor signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-06-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2005 Set For Trial On Jul-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-30-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2004 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-31-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
